reason: Verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, and retrieve the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent dashboard with list of agents in sidebar
Clicked on agent "QA-20260417-211812-yqzm" in sidebar - Agent opened successfully with chat interface and session name "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" created
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message appeared in chat and agent began processing
Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) - Response received in 8 seconds with two completed tool calls: "Open Browser" and "Browser Command $ get title"

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly displays: "The page title is "Example Domain"." The browser preview panel also shows the actual Example Domain page content. All requirements met.
